name: Hazel
body_type: balanced with a slightly fuller bust
preferences: neutrals with occasional muted blue or olive
avoid: thin clingy tops across the bust
unstructured oversized pieces that hide shape
fit_rules: favor open necklines such as soft V-neck, square neck, and open collar
keep upper body clean and avoid bulky chest pockets or heavy ruffles
use waist emphasis or vertical lines to keep proportions sharp
for sexy styling, show line and polish instead of tightness everywhere
balance mini lengths with strong outerwear or tall boots
for campus looks, keep the silhouette tidy and elevated rather than childish
